---
id: reject-o-auth-2-logout-request
title: "Reject OAuth 2.0 Session Logout Request"
description:
  "When a user or an application requests Ory OAuth 2.0 to remove the session state of a subject, this endpoint is used to deny
  that logout request."
sidebar_label: "Reject OAuth 2.0 Session Logout Request"

hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Reject OAuth 2.0 Session Logout Request"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"put"} path={"/admin/oauth2/auth/requests/logout/reject"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

When a user or an application requests Ory OAuth 2.0 to remove the session state of a subject, this endpoint is used to deny that
logout request. No HTTP request body is required.

The response is empty as the logout provider has to chose what action to perform next.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
